heading: Effective date
label: 1487 Effective date
text: This chapter shall be effective upon , or upon the date the convention becomes effective as to the United States, whichever is later.February 5, 1974
notes: References in TextThe date the convention became effective as to the United States, referred to in text, is .May 6, 1975
